## Description

Describe your changes and the motivation behind them.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) conventions
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format` pass (Python)
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes (TypeScript)
- [ ] API response format follows `{ "data": ..., "meta": { ... } }` convention
